subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath, through His Most Great Name, shed His effulgence upon the world when the Books were revealed and set forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی باسمه العلام علی العالم اذا ظهرت الکتب و فصلت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
